creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Fri Jul  5 15:37:00 2013
New Revision: 322338
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322338

Log:
  www/dojo: update to 1.9.1
  
  - Update to 1.9.1
  - Take maintainership
  
  PR:		ports/179682
  Submitted by:	wg (myself)
  Approved by:	maintainer (timeout)

Modified:
  head/www/dojo/Makefile
  head/www/dojo/distinfo
  head/www/dojo/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/dojo/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/dojo/Makefile	Fri Jul  5 15:17:15 2013	(r322337)
+++ head/www/dojo/Makefile	Fri Jul  5 15:37:00 2013	(r322338)
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=		dojo
-PORTVERSION=		1.9.0
+PORTVERSION=		1.9.1
 CATEGORIES=		www
 MASTER_SITES=		http://download.dojotoolkit.org/release-${PORTVERSION}/
 DISTNAME=		dojo-release-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=		glarkin@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=		wg@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=		Open-source DHTML toolkit written in JavaScript
 
 NO_BUILD=		yes

==============================================================================
